headline: Citi Believes Abbott (ABT) Shares are Undervalued Relative to Business Segments
summary: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) is included among the Dividend Stock Portfolio: Top 10 Stocks to Buy According to Reddit. On June 17, Citi reiterated its Buy rating on Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT). It said that the company’s individual businesses may be worth more than the market currently values the company as a whole. According to the firm’s […]
